name: phantom-mcp
description: Phantom embedded wallet for AI agents: check balances, transfer tokens, swap on Solana, sign transactions and messages. Powered by Phantom — the leading multi-chain crypto wallet.
long_description:
The Phantom MCP server gives AI agents direct access to an embedded Phantom wallet. Authenticate once with Google or Apple via Phantom Connect, then the agent can:

- **Check connection** — `get_connection_status` (lightweight, no network call)
- **Get wallet addresses** — Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, Sui via `get_wallet_addresses`
- **Check balances** — all fungible token balances with live USD prices via `get_token_balances`
- **Transfer tokens** — SOL or SPL tokens on Solana via `transfer_tokens`
- **Swap tokens** — optimized quotes and execution via Phantom's swap engine (`buy_token`)
- **Sign and broadcast transactions** — sign pre-built transactions via `sign_transaction`
- **Sign messages** — EIP-191 and Solana message signing via `sign_message`

Phantom is an enterprise-grade non-custodial wallet supporting Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, Base, Polygon, Sui, and Monad. Sessions are stored at `~/.phantom-mcp/session.json` and persist across restarts. If the session expires, re-authentication is triggered automatically.

tools.name: get_wallet_addresses
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Returns all blockchain addresses (Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, Sui) for the authenticated wallet. Call first to confirm connection. Auth errors trigger automatic re-authentication.

tools.name: get_connection_status
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Lightweight local check of Phantom wallet connection status. Returns {connected, walletId, organizationId}. No API call — use to check if a session exists before other operations.

tools.name: get_token_balances
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Returns all fungible token balances with live USD prices. Response: {items: [{symbol, name, caip19, totalQuantity, totalQuantityString, price: {price, priceChange24h}}]}. totalQuantity is human-readable, totalQuantityString is base units. Parse caip19 after '/token:' for the Solana mint address.

tools.name: transfer_tokens
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Transfers SOL or SPL tokens on Solana. Requires ≥0.000005 SOL for fees. Use for direct sends; use buy_token for swaps. Returns {signature} — check on Solana explorer to confirm.

tools.name: buy_token
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Solana token swap via Phantom routing. execute:false=quote only, execute:true=sign+send. Requires SOL for fees. Returns {execution.signature} — check on Solana explorer to confirm.

tools.name: sign_transaction
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Signs and broadcasts a pre-built transaction (base64url for Solana, RLP hex for EVM). Only use when you have a complete transaction from an external source. Returns {signedTransaction, signature}.

tools.name: sign_message
tools.description: Phantom Wallet: Signs a UTF-8 message. EIP-191 for Ethereum chains, UTF-8 signing for Solana. Use for auth challenges and proof-of-ownership. Returns {signature}.

phantom_app_id.title: App ID
phantom_app_id.description: Your Phantom App ID from the Phantom Portal (phantom.com/portal). Required. The email you use to sign in to the Portal must match the email you authenticate with in Claude.

phantom_client_secret.title: Client Secret
phantom_client_secret.description: Optional client secret for confidential OAuth clients. Leave blank to use public client mode (recommended for most users).
